text_block_list.text: King Halo and I go into town.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wait a minute. That poster over there...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ooh... It looks like they're holding an art
exhibition.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, why don't we go take a look? It
seems to be nearby.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Here we are! Ahh, now this is a place fit for a king
like me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
First-rate people go to first-rate places, after all.
Attending events such as orchestral concerts and
the like.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As my trainer, you should keep a list of such
first-rate destinations in mind.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! But of course!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Paintings created by first-rate artists are filled
with emotion!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Here, look at the painting showcased on the
poster.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Even though the painting looks messy at first
glance, it conveys the artist's state of mind!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It must have been done by a first-rate painter. I
wonder who the artist is... Let's see...

King Halo and I both look closely at the
exhibition poster.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: "I Wuv You Mommy and Daddy, from the Kindergarten Collection."
choice_data_list: There's definitely a lot of emotion in there.
There's definitely a lot of emotion in there.
It's not quite a first-rate painter, is it?
It's not quite a first-rate painter, is it?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: "I Wuv You Mommy and Daddy, from the Kindergarten Collection."
choice_data_list: There's definitely a lot of emotion in there.
There's definitely a lot of emotion in there.
It's not quite a first-rate painter, is it?
It's not quite a first-rate painter, is it?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh... Ohohoho! But of course!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This work is simply brimming with the youthful
artist's feelings for their parents!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: To the parents, their child is a first-rate painter!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Let's go see it right away! Admission is free, which
is truly first-rate!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The artists gave their all to create these works!
They're so adorable! So soothing and refreshing!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, this kind of exhibition isn't half bad.

I feel warm and fuzzy as I wander through the
museum with King Halo.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
W-well, when it comes to first-rate painters,
being famous or not is of no concern!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Being first-rate is all about whether you touch
people's hearts!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This painting has left a deep impression on me!
That's why it's definitely first-rate!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I seems I'll need to make it clearer for you... Come
on, let's go inside and take a look!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Look at the faces of the artists' parents as they
look at the paintings! Happiness itself!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There's the proof of how well it touches people's
hearts! Take care to remember what the essence
of first-rate looks like!

And that's how visiting a museum with King Halo
taught me the true meaning of first-rate.
